title: Banking Sector Recapitalization: A Crucial Step Towards Nigeria’s $1 Trillion Economy Goal – CBN - FinancialEDGE
description: The Deputy Governor, Corporate Services, Central Bank Of Nigeria (CBN), Ms Emem Usoro, has said that Nigeria must ensure a strong, stable, and well-capitalised banking sector, if it hopes to attain its goal of becoming a one-trillion-dollar economy. Delivering the keynote address at the 36th Finance Correspondents Association of Nigeria (FICAN) and Business Editors seminar in
html: The Deputy Governor, Corporate Services, Central Bank Of Nigeria (CBN), Ms Emem Usoro, has said that Nigeria must ensure a strong, stable, and well-capitalised banking sector, if it hopes to attain its goal of becoming a one-trillion-dollar economy.
